---
name: Adapter Request
about: Request support for a new TUI (Terminal User Interface)
title: "[Adapter] "
labels: new-adapter
assignees: ""
---

## Target TUI

- **Name:** <!-- e.g., "Warp AI" -->
- **Website/link:** <!-- URL -->
- **Repository:** <!-- GitHub or other source, if open source -->

---

## Evidence of Stability

Does this TUI have a stable, documented configuration format?

- [ ] The TUI has a published configuration specification
- [ ] The configuration format has been stable for at least 6 months
- [ ] The TUI is actively maintained (commits in the last 3 months)

**Provide links to documentation:**

> <!-- Links to official docs -->

---

## Maintenance Commitment

> **NOTE:** New adapters represent a long-term maintenance commitment. The ForgeWeave maintainers expect a clear maintenance plan.

- **Who will maintain this adapter long-term?** <!-- yourself, your team, or someone else? -->
- **Do you commit to updating the adapter when the TUI's format changes?** <!-- Yes/No -->
- **Are you willing to be listed as the primary contact for this adapter?** <!-- Yes/No -->

---

## Community Interest

- How many users have requested this adapter? <!-- link relevant discussions -->
- Is this TUI widely used in the developer community?
- Are there any existing open-source projects that integrate with this TUI?

---

## Technical Details

| Aspect | Details |
|---|---|
| Configuration format | <!-- e.g., YAML, JSON, TOML, Markdown --> |
| Config directory name | <!-- e.g., .warp/ .cursor/ .zed/ --> |
| Naming convention | <!-- kebab-case, snake_case, camelCase --> |
| Skill/agent support? | <!-- Does the TUI support custom skills or agents? --> |

---

## Additional Context

Any details about the TUI's configuration format that would help implementers.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing adapter requests before opening this one
- [ ] I have provided evidence of stability
- [ ] I have a maintenance plan for this adapter
